overlaps_with: Jellyfish content asset and storyboard metadata reference
distinct_engineering_value: local original AIGC video pipeline stage contracts
dedup_decision.jellyfish_boundary: Jellyfish remains the content asset and storyboard metadata reference; story-flicks adds pipeline stage and handoff structure only.
dedup_decision.seedance2_boundary: seedance2-skill remains the next Section 5 verification item; no provider or video generation call is made here.

local_contract_evidence.cli_build_command: python -m heitang_kb_forge.cli build-video-pipeline-schema-library --output artifacts/audits/section_5/story_flicks_video_pipeline_schema/video_pipeline_schema --library-name "HeiTang AIGC Video Pipeline Schema"

why_reference_only: A local original AIGC video pipeline schema reference is implemented and validated.
The run produced non-empty stage contracts, asset handoffs, timeline metadata, an index, a report, and a validation report.
The capability adds a future module slot without duplicating Jellyfish content asset metadata or seedance2 provider/template verification.
No story-flicks runtime is installed or executed, so the correct decision is reference_only rather than real_integration.
boundaries: reference_only means local stage, handoff, timeline, and governance schema evidence only.
No story-flicks runtime, code, prompt files, SKILL.md files, scripts, or repository contents are bundled.
No story-to-video, image generation, video generation, audio generation, voice cloning, media rendering, upload/download, provider, or account execution is implemented.
UI may show pipeline schema status and preview only; full UI workflow remains Campaign 4 work.
remaining_gap: Section 5 items 5.11 through 5.14, strengthening items 5.S1-5.S3, Campaign 3 final consistency gate, external Skill learning E2E, owned Skill generation, multi-agent workflow, full UI workflow, Core Bridge, configuration, Full Gate, EXE, and release remain incomplete.
